name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans in Memphis with loan amounts from $100–$50,000 and same-day funding. They welcome applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a physical location at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee, specializing in title-secured lending. The company positions itself as an accessible alternative for consumers with damaged credit profiles, explicitly welcoming those with bad credit history and past bankruptcies. They advertise same-day cash funding for applicants who sign up by noon, targeting individuals in immediate financial need.

The company offers secured loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, with the borrower's vehicle title serving as collateral. Their stated loan structure allows customers to "get cash and keep your car," implying that vehicle possession remains with the borrower throughout the loan term. They emphasize a three-step process: online application, cash receipt, and title return upon repayment. The company operates Monday–Friday 9am–7pm and Saturday 10am–5pm, with Sunday closures.

Swift Title Loans distinguishes itself through personalized service, with multiple customer reviews highlighting a staff member named Alfred who reportedly provides patient guidance through the application process. Customer testimonials consistently praise transparent communication, straightforward paperwork, and a welcoming office atmosphere. The company advertises 256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for online applications. Operating hours and extended Saturday availability position them for working-class borrowers.

Customer reviews reveal a company generally delivering on its core promise of fast, accessible lending for credit-challenged applicants. However, reviews also identify recurring operational gaps: limited payment plan options, unclear external signage, crowded parking, and lack of digital tools (mobile app, text reminders, tutorial videos). The company's focus on title-secured lending places it in the emergency-cash category rather than personal loans, as these are asset-backed short-term solutions rather than unsecured credit products.
address: 2111 W Shaw Ave STE A, Fresno, CA 93711

company_info.headquarters: 2111 W Shaw Ave STE A, Fresno, CA 93711

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Loan range of $100–$50,000 accommodates both emergency and larger cash needs
Explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit history and past bankruptcies
Personalized service model with patient staff guidance through paperwork
256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online applications
Extended Saturday hours (10am–5pm) for working-class accessibility
Consistent customer reports of transparent terms and professional demeanor
cons: Title-secured structure means vehicle is at risk if loan defaults
Limited payment plan options according to multiple customer suggestions
Poor external signage creates confusion for first-time visitors
No mobile app or digital payment management tools available
Limited parking and crowded lot during busy hours
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or bankruptcy history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Vehicle owners needing $500–$5,000 quickly for unexpected expenses
Borrowers seeking alternatives to payday loans who own a paid-off or low-lien vehicle
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for consumers with damaged credit who need emergency cash quickly and own a vehicle with available title equity. The main caveat is that defaulting on the loan puts the vehicle at risk of repossession, and the lack of flexible payment plans and digital tools may complicate managing the debt.
services: In-person loan processing and paperwork assistance
Borrower retains vehicle possession during loan term
